response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Phonetic check confirms the song is 'Overdose' by Natori, NOT 'Bokura no 16-bit Sensou' as suggested by the reference JSON; the JSON is incorrect and was ignored. 2. The singer (Kobo Kanaeru) performs a bilingual version, mixing Japanese and Indonesian lyrics. 3. The skit following the song also uses a mix of Japanese, Indonesian, and English. 4. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio waveform, ensuring no early cutoffs or cross-pause merging.

subtitles.original: 流れた間の数が増えていくから
subtitles.english: Because the number of flowing moments is increasing

subtitles.original: たまにあるラッキーザマに合わない
subtitles.english: I don't fit in with the occasional lucky states

subtitles.original: 名前も知らない人と目が合う今日この頃
subtitles.english: These days, making eye contact with strangers

subtitles.original: 何かを指針にして振るい
subtitles.english: Shaking with something as my guide

subtitles.original: 夢見る時間に限りがあること期待してたら
subtitles.english: If I was hoping that dreaming time was limited

subtitles.original: 励まされていくそこは私じゃなきゃいけない
subtitles.english: I'm encouraged; it has to be me there

subtitles.original: 理由はどこになんて失敗作
subtitles.english: Asking where the reason is... what a failure

subtitles.original: 踊り場を歩いていたいたけ
subtitles.english: I just wanted to be walking on the landing

subtitles.original: 身を私かじゃ終われない
subtitles.english: I can't end it if it's just me

subtitles.original: 臆病も魔が差しちゃう
subtitles.english: Even cowardice is tempted by evil

subtitles.original: 独りよがりなだけの優しさ
subtitles.english: A kindness that's just self-satisfied

subtitles.original: 目を逸らしちゃう頃
subtitles.english: Around the time I look away

subtitles.original: Bagaikan cinta berlayar hampa tanpa nyawa
subtitles.english: Like love sailing empty without a soul

subtitles.original: Mengutuk punya pilihan
subtitles.english: Cursing having a choice

subtitles.original: 踊り場を歩いていたいたけ
subtitles.english: I just wanted to be walking on the landing

subtitles.original: 身を私かじゃ終われない
subtitles.english: I can't end it if it's just me

subtitles.original: ほらね
subtitles.english: See?

subtitles.original: 面倒なんです。全部大正解
subtitles.english: It's a bother. Everything is perfectly correct

subtitles.original: でも狂うも好き放題
subtitles.english: But going crazy as much as I want

subtitles.original: 私は叶えるの
subtitles.english: I will make it come true (Kanaeru)

subtitles.original: 私じゃいられない
subtitles.english: I can't stay as myself

subtitles.original: 今だけを見つめていたい
subtitles.english: I want to gaze only at 'now'

subtitles.original: そう今だけを零さないように
subtitles.english: Yes, so that I don't spill this moment

subtitles.original: Keren banget gak sih?
subtitles.english: Wasn't that really cool?

subtitles.original: Suara Kobo eh Jebo maksudnya
subtitles.english: Kobo's voice— wait, Jebo's I mean

subtitles.original: Aku keren, suara keren ya gak?
subtitles.english: I'm cool, voice is cool, right?

subtitles.original: udah disemangatin sih
subtitles.english: I've been encouraged, after all

subtitles.original: 緊張する。でもや
subtitles.english: I'm nervous. But you know,

subtitles.original: 発された。 Natori さんに励まされて、私ももっとカッコよくなりたい
subtitles.english: Natori-san encouraged me, so I want to become even cooler

subtitles.original: うりゃ！
subtitles.english: Hya!

subtitles.original: Lah? Tapi bentar...
subtitles.english: Huh? But wait a sec...

subtitles.original: Kok mendung gini?
subtitles.english: Why is it getting cloudy?

subtitles.original: Kalau hujan gini kan gak jadi keren
subtitles.english: If it rains like this, it won't be cool anymore

subtitles.original: Ni timing hujannya gak bisa di-delay?
subtitles.english: Can't the timing of this rain be delayed?

subtitles.original: Ngapain payung lagi... kasa...
subtitles.english: What's with an umbrella now... umbrella...

subtitles.original: Kasa pake gitar apa gak ya? Jangan ya.
subtitles.english: Should I use the guitar as an umbrella? No, better not.

subtitles.original: あ、仕方がない
subtitles.english: Ah, it can't be helped

subtitles.original: Aku pasti bisa
subtitles.english: I can definitely do it

subtitles.original: 見て！この伝捨魔のパワー！
subtitles.english: Look! The power of this Densha-ma!

subtitles.original: え？コボ？コボ kenapa anjir?!
subtitles.english: Eh? Kobo? What happened to Kobo, damn?!

subtitles.original: Bangun bangun bangun! Hello? Help!
subtitles.english: Wake up wake up wake up! Hello? Help!

subtitles.original: Pokobo! Pokobo come on! Eh? Bangun bangun!
subtitles.english: Pokobo! Pokobo come on! Eh? Wake up wake up!

subtitles.english: No! We can't do this again! I'm here for your anniversary, not to raise you from a baby up again!
